name: System Monitor
description: Capture CPU, memory, or disk-usage snapshots and copy them to the macOS clipboard. Ported from the Raycast System Monitor extension by hossammourad (MIT).

commands.name: Copy CPU Snapshot
commands.description: Sample CPU usage with `top -l 1` and copy the CPU and load-average lines to the clipboard.

commands.name: Copy Memory Snapshot
commands.description: Sample memory pressure with `vm_stat` and the `PhysMem` line of `top` and copy a combined snapshot to the clipboard.

commands.name: Copy Disk Snapshot
commands.description: List mounted local filesystems with `df -h` and copy the human-readable usage table to the clipboard.
